goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should 'arrive by 20:15'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'entrance fee', and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on wednesday and should arrive by 20:15
The train should depart from cambridge and should go to london liverpool street
Make sure you get travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of college
Make sure you get address, entrance fee, and postcode
